plan: Wire source file selection into StandardFacetBar dropdown on Classify tab

trigger.rationale: Fixed width prevents layout shift when file names vary. Truncates long names in the bar.

panel.behavior: Browser auto-sizes option list to widest entry
panel.future: Swap to custom dropdown panel if 20+ files or long names become an issue

changes.description: When tabName is 'classify' or 'entities', populate dropdown options from this.sourceTab.files[]. Set selected to this.FILE_NAME. On other tabs, keep generic 'All' option.
changes.detail: Build options string: files.map(f => `<option value="${f.name}" ${f.name === this.FILE_NAME ? 'selected' : ''}>${f.name}</option>`). Add a disabled placeholder option '-- Select Source --' when no file is active.

changes.description: Add min-w-[200px] max-w-[280px] and text truncation classes to the select element for fixed trigger sizing.
After header re-renders (line 2046), bind change listener on #workbench-filter. On change, call this.loadFile(select.value). Only bind when on classify/entities tabs.
changes.detail: const filter = document.getElementById('workbench-filter'); if (filter && ['classify','entities'].includes(tabName)) { filter.onchange = (e) => { if (e.target.value) this.loadFile(e.target.value); }; }

label_behavior.classify_tab: Dropdown shows source files, selected = active file
label_behavior.entities_tab: Dropdown shows source files, selected = active file
label_behavior.export_tab: Dropdown shows source files, selected = active file (read-only context)
